title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are up to date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is out of date
scenario: Language change and DFU complete successfully when earbuds are on latest firmware but smart charge case is on outdated firmware on Voyager Free 60+
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) to open Device Settings
Ensure earbuds/headset are on the latest firmware version
Ensure smart charge case/stand is on an outdated firmware version
In Device Settings, locate and tap Language option
Select a different language from the list
Observe the DFU (Device Firmware Update) prompt for the smart charge case/stand
Follow on-screen instructions to initiate the firmware update for the case/stand
Wait for the firmware update to complete
Verify the earbuds/headset remain on the latest firmware
Verify the smart charge case/stand is now updated to the latest firmware version
Check the language displayed on the smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) screen
expected: Language change and DFU complete successfully. Both earbuds/headset and smart charge case/stand are updated to the latest firmware. The language on the smart charge case changes to the selected language.
